title: Junior Instructional Designer at TechSaksham South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at TechSaksham South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the TechSaksham South Asia Partners family as a Instructional Designer in Surat. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TechSaksham South Asia Partners:
TechSaksham South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TechSaksham South Asia Partners!
